targets.rawSql:
select host_name as ServerName, host_ip, host_name, cpu_usr_pct, cpu_sys_pct, cpu_wio_pct, mem_free_mb, tbs_cnt, err_cnt, dt, hh
  from dba_oracle_daily_report

-- SELECT CC.HOST_IP, CC.HOST_NAME, AA.CPU_USR_PCT, AA.CPU_SYS_PCT, AA.CPU_WIO_PCT, AA.MEM_FREE_MB, BB.TBS_CNT, DD.ERR_CNT, AA.DT, AA.HH
-- FROM (                                                                                                                                     
--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH                                                                                             
--         , MAX(CPU.CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_WIO_PCT) AS CPU_WIO_PCT                    
--         , MIN(MEM.MEM_FREE_MB) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                                              
--       FROM (                                                                                                                                
--         SELECT CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                        
--             , MAX(CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU_WIO_PCT) CPU_WIO_PCT                               
--         FROM (                                                                                                                              
--         SELECT C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24') AS HH,                                                
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 0 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_USR_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 1 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_SYS_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 2 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_WIO_PCT
--           FROM LPSIS1.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN C -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE C.OS_ID in (0,1,2)
--             AND C.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND C.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             -- 
--             AND C.DB_ID = 7
--             AND C.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric
--             --
--       GROUP BY C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24')                                                             
--         ) AS CPU_USE                                                                                                                        
--         GROUP BY CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                      
--       ) CPU,                                                                                                                               
--       ( SELECT M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24') AS HH,                                                    
--                 MIN(ROUND(M.AVG_VALUE / 1024.0, 1)) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                          
--           FROM LPSIS1.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN M -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE M.OS_ID = 4                                                                                                                 
--             AND M.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND M.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             --
--             AND M.DB_ID = 7
--             AND M.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric
--             --
--         GROUP BY M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24')                                                                
--         ) MEM                                                                                                                               
--     WHERE CPU.DB_ID = MEM.DB_ID                                                                                                            
--       AND CPU.DT    = MEM.DT                                                                                                               
--       AND CPU.HH    = MEM.HH                                                                                                               
--     GROUP BY CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT                                                                                                              
--     ) AA,                                                                                                                                   
--   (SELECT COUNT(1) AS TBS_CNT
--       FROM ( SELECT A.DB_ID,
--                     TABLESPACE_NAME,  
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE,   
--                     ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE,
--                     ROUND(COALESCE(      
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
--                                                                                       ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
--                                                                                   END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT,
--                     DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
--               FROM LPSIS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A, (SELECT MAX(TIME) AS MAX_TIME, MAX(PARTITION_KEY) AS PARTITION_KEY, MAX(DB_ID) as DB_ID
--                                                     FROM LPSIS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO
--                                                     WHERE PARTITION_KEY =  concat(to_char(now()- interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'007')::int4) B
--               WHERE TIME = B.MAX_TIME
--                 AND A.PARTITION_KEY = B.PARTITION_KEY
--                 --
--                 AND A.DB_ID = B.DB_ID
--                 AND A.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
--                 AND A.TIME <  CURRENT_DATE + 1
--                 AND A.DB_ID = 7
--                 --
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
--             GROUP BY A.DB_ID, TABLESPACE_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME)
--             ORDER BY USE_PRCT DESC
--   ) TBS_CHK
--       WHERE USE_PRCT > 95) BB                                                                                                              
--     , apm_db_info cc                                                                                                                        
--     , (SELECT COUNT(1) ERR_CNT                                                                                                              
--         FROM LPSIS1.ORA_ALERTLOG_HISTORY Z                                                                                    
--         WHERE TIME >= CURRENT_DATE -1                                                                                                       
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%KILL SESSION%'                                                                                               
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%aborting process unknown ospid%'                                                                      
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%ORA-01013%'                                                                                                  
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%SQL Analyze time limit interrupt%'
--           -- 
--           AND PARTITION_KEY in (concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric, concat(to_char(now() - interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'007')::numeric)
--           AND DB_ID = 7
--           --
--     ) DD                                                                                                                                   
-- where aa.db_id = cc.db_id
-- UNION ALL
-- SELECT CC.HOST_IP, CC.HOST_NAME, AA.CPU_USR_PCT, AA.CPU_SYS_PCT, AA.CPU_WIO_PCT, AA.MEM_FREE_MB, BB.TBS_CNT, DD.ERR_CNT, AA.DT, AA.HH
-- FROM (                                                                                                                                     
--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH                                                                                             
--         , MAX(CPU.CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_WIO_PCT) AS CPU_WIO_PCT                    
--         , MIN(MEM.MEM_FREE_MB) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                                              
--       FROM (                                                                                                                                
--         SELECT CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                        
--             , MAX(CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU_WIO_PCT) CPU_WIO_PCT                               
--         FROM (                                                                                                                              
--         SELECT C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24') AS HH,                                                
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 0 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_USR_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 1 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_SYS_PCT,
--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 2 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_WIO_PCT
--           FROM LPSIS2.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN C -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE C.OS_ID in (0,1,2)
--             AND C.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND C.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             -- 
--             AND C.DB_ID = 8
--             AND C.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric
--             --
--       GROUP BY C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24')                                                             
--         ) AS CPU_USE                                                                                                                        
--         GROUP BY CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                      
--       ) CPU,                                                                                                                               
--       ( SELECT M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD') AS DT, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24') AS HH,                                                    
--                 MIN(ROUND(M.AVG_VALUE / 1024.0, 1)) AS MEM_FREE_MB                                                                          
--           FROM LPSIS2.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN M -- OWNER 변수                                                                    
--           WHERE M.OS_ID = 4                                                                                                                 
--             AND M.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE                                                                                                      
--             AND M.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             --
--             AND M.DB_ID = 8
--             AND M.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric
--             --
--         GROUP BY M.DB_ID, TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(M.TIME,'HH24')                                                                
--         ) MEM                                                                                                                               
--     WHERE CPU.DB_ID = MEM.DB_ID                                                                                                            
--       AND CPU.DT    = MEM.DT                                                                                                               
--       AND CPU.HH    = MEM.HH                                                                                                               
--     GROUP BY CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT                                                                                                              
--     ) AA,                                                                                                                                   
--   (SELECT COUNT(1) AS TBS_CNT
--       FROM ( SELECT A.DB_ID,
--                     TABLESPACE_NAME,  
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE) - SUM(FREE_SPACE) )  /1024.0,2) AS USED_SPACE,   
--                     ROUND(SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0,2) AS FREE_SPACE,
--                     ROUND(COALESCE(      
--                     ROUND((SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0 - SUM(FREE_SPACE)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
--                                                                                       ELSE ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_SPACE)/1024.0,2)
--                                                                                   END, 0) * 100,2) AS USE_PRCT,
--                     DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME ) AS TIME
--               FROM LPSIS2.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO A, (SELECT MAX(TIME) AS MAX_TIME, MAX(PARTITION_KEY) AS PARTITION_KEY, MAX(DB_ID) as DB_ID
--                                                     FROM LPSIS2.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO
--                                                     WHERE PARTITION_KEY =  concat(to_char(now()- interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'008')::int4) B
--               WHERE TIME = B.MAX_TIME
--                 AND A.PARTITION_KEY = B.PARTITION_KEY
--                 --
--                 AND A.DB_ID = B.DB_ID
--                 AND A.TIME >= CURRENT_DATE - 1
--                 AND A.TIME <  CURRENT_DATE + 1
--                 AND A.DB_ID = 8
--                 --
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
--                 AND TABLESPACE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
--             GROUP BY A.DB_ID, TABLESPACE_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('day', A.TIME)
--             ORDER BY USE_PRCT DESC
--   ) TBS_CHK
--       WHERE USE_PRCT > 95) BB                                                                                                              
--     , apm_db_info cc                                                                                                                        
--     , (SELECT COUNT(1) ERR_CNT                                                                                                              
--         FROM LPSIS2.ORA_ALERTLOG_HISTORY Z                                                                                    
--         WHERE TIME >= CURRENT_DATE -1                                                                                                       
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%KILL SESSION%'                                                                                               
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%aborting process unknown ospid%'                                                                      
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%ORA-01013%'                                                                                                  
--           AND VALUE NOT LIKE '%SQL Analyze time limit interrupt%'
--           -- 
--           AND PARTITION_KEY in (concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric, concat(to_char(now() - interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'008')::numeric)
--           AND DB_ID = 8
--           --
--     ) DD                                                                                                                                   
-- where aa.db_id = cc.db_id
-- UNION ALL
-- SELECT CC.HOST_IP, CC.HOST_NAME, AA.CPU_USR_PCT, AA.CPU_SYS_PCT, AA.CPU_WIO_PCT, AA.MEM_FREE_MB, BB.TBS_CNT, DD.ERR_CNT, AA.DT, AA.HH

--                 ROUND(AVG(case when C.OS_ID = 2 then C.AVG_VALUE / 100.0 else NULL end), 2) AS CPU_WIO_PCT
--           FROM LOTTEHRS1.APM_DB_OS_STAT_10MIN C -- OWNER 변수

--             AND C.PARTITION_KEY = concat(to_char(now(),'YYMMDD') ,'005')::numeric

--       GROUP BY C.DB_ID, TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR (C.TIME, 'HH24')

--             AND M.TIME < CURRENT_DATE + 1
--             --

--       AND CPU.HH    = MEM.HH                                                                                                               
--     GROUP BY CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT

--                                                     FROM LOTTEHRS1.ORA_TABLESPACE_INFO
--                                                     WHERE PARTITION_KEY =  concat(to_char(now()- interval '1 day','YYMMDD') ,'005')::int4) B

-- FROM (                                                                                                                                     
--     SELECT CPU.DB_ID, CPU.DT, MAX(CPU.HH) AS HH                                                                                             
--         , MAX(CPU.CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU.CPU_WIO_PCT) AS CPU_WIO_PCT

--       FROM (                                                                                                                                
--         SELECT CPU_USE.DB_ID, CPU_USE.DT, CPU_USE.HH                                                                                        
--             , MAX(CPU_USR_PCT) AS CPU_USR_PCT, MAX(CPU_SYS_PCT) AS CPU_SYS_PCT, MAX(CPU_WIO_PCT) CPU_WIO_PCT

--             --

--         ) AS CPU_USE

SELECT T1.INST_ID
      ,T1.JOB_NM as ServiceName
      ,T1.IP_ADDR
      ,T1.CLU_CMPS_YN
      ,T1.CPU_PCT
      ,T1.MEM_CHECK
      ,CASE WHEN T1.TBS = '' THEN '0' ELSE T1.TBS END AS TBS
      ,T1.AGENT_WRK_FAIL_CNT
      ,T1.ERR_LOG_CNT
      ,T1.BLK_TM
  FROM (
       SELECT 
            [INST_ID],
            [JOB_NM],
            [IP_ADDR],
            [CLU_NODE_NM],
            [CLU_CMPS_YN],
            CASE WHEN [CPU_PCT] > 95 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR, [CPU_PCT])
                 ELSE '0'
            END AS [CPU_PCT],
            CASE WHEN [MEM_CHECK] = 1 THEN FORMAT(MEM_USE_PCT, '#') + '%(' + FORMAT(MEM_FREE_SIZE / 1024, '#.#') + 'GB)'
                 ELSE [MEM_CHECK] 
            END AS [MEM_CHECK],
            CASE WHEN [USE1] > 95 THEN [DRV1] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE1]) + '% ' ELSE '' END 
          + CASE WHEN [USE2] > 95 THEN [DRV2] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE2]) + '% ' ELSE '' END 
          + CASE WHEN [USE3] > 95 THEN [DRV3] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE3]) + '% ' ELSE '' END 
          + CASE WHEN INST_ID = 9 THEN '' WHEN [USE4] > 95 THEN [DRV4] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE4]) + '% ' ELSE '' END 
		  -- (구)전자저널 I:\ 96% 유지 특이사항없음
          + CASE WHEN [USE5] > 95 THEN [DRV5] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE5]) + '% ' ELSE '' END 
          + CASE WHEN [USE6] > 95 THEN [DRV6] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE6]) + '% ' ELSE '' END 
          + CASE WHEN [USE7] > 95 THEN [DRV7] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE7]) + '% ' ELSE '' END
          + CASE WHEN [USE8] > 95 THEN [DRV8] + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, [USE8]) + '% ' ELSE '' END
            AS TBS,
            [AGENT_WRK_FAIL_CNT],
            [ERR_LOG_CNT],
            [BLK_TM],
            [INP_DTM],
            [CLCT_DTM]
       FROM [dbo].[TB_DailyReport_S]
       WHERE INP_DTM = (SELECT MAX(INP_DTM) FROM  [dbo].[TB_DailyReport_S]) 
       AND	INST_ID IN (2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 13, 46, 47, 39, 50, 51, 52, 53, 54, 24, 27, 48, 21, 57, 56, 15, 16, 55, 79)
       ) T1
ORDER BY JOB_NM DESC

SELECT T1.ServiceName      
	  ,CASE WHEN T1.STATUS <> 0 OR FORMAT((T1.Elapsed / T1.ElpasedStd * 100) - 100, '##0.#') > 30.0 OR FORMAT((T1.Elapsed / T1.ElpasedStd * 100) - 100, '##0.#') < -30.0 THEN 1
	        ELSE 0 END AS "BACKUP"
  FROM (
        SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY POLICY, CollectDT ORDER BY JOBID DESC) ROWNUM
              ,CASE WHEN policy = 'lpscsdb01_mssql' THEN '[POS] 매출'
                    WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms' THEN '[마케팅] (신)사은'
                    WHEN policy = 'lpgcsdb_mssql' THEN '[상품권] 상품권'
                    WHEN policy = 'cul-sqldb_mssql' THEN '[마케팅] (신)문화센터'
                    WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg' THEN '[마케팅] 사은STG'
                    WHEN policy = 'lpenr-sqldb_mssql' THEN '[마케팅] (신)에누리'
                    WHEN policy = 'ldps_mssql' THEN '[경영지원] 동료사원'
                    WHEN policy = 'ld-imdb1_mssql' THEN '[경영지원] IM'
                    WHEN policy = 'lpea-sqldb_mssql' THEN '[경영지원] 전자결재'					
                    ELSE policy END ServiceName 
              ,Schedule
              ,Client
              ,Policy
              ,format(Started,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') Started
              ,format(Ended,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') Ended
              ,STATE as State
              ,CASE WHEN policy = 'lpscsdb01_mssql' THEN 10800			--[POS]매출			3시간
             	    WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms' THEN 7500	--[마케팅]사은		2시간
             	    WHEN policy = 'lpgcsdb_mssql' THEN 10800			--[상품권]상품권	2시간
             	    WHEN policy = 'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg' THEN 1500		--[마케팅]사은STG	25분
             	    WHEN policy = 'lpenr-sqldb_mssql' THEN 1800			--[마케팅]에누리	25분
             	    WHEN policy = 'ldps_mssql' THEN 720					--[경지]동료사원	12분
             	    WHEN policy = 'ld-imdb1_mssql' THEN 1500			--[경지]계정관리	25분
             	    WHEN policy = 'lpea-sqldb_mssql' THEN 3900			--[경지]전자결재	1시간5분
             	    WHEN policy = 'cul-sqldb_mssql' THEN 750			--[마케팅]신문화센터 12분30초
             	    ELSE policy END ElpasedStd
              ,CASE WHEN Ended IS NOT NULL THEN Elapsed ELSE NULL END AS Elapsed
              ,format(ENDED - STARTED,'HH:mm:ss') AS ElapsedTime
              ,Status
         FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
        WHERE 1=1
          AND COLLECTDT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),GETDATE(),112)
          AND SCHEDULE = 'full_daily'
          AND POLICY IN ('lpscsdb01_mssql',
                         'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms',
                         'lpgcsdb_mssql',
                         'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg',
                         'lpenr-sqldb_mssql',
                         'ldps_mssql',
                         'ld-imdb1_mssql',
                         'lpea-sqldb_mssql',
                         'cul-sqldb_mssql')
       ) T1
   WHERE T1.ROWNUM = 1
